holdings.infoBox: UDI is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Johnson & Johnson stock at 4.17%, State Street at 3.84%, AbbVie at 3.83%, ConocoPhillips at 3.55%, and East West Bancorp at 3.53%.

overview.description: The USCF Dividend Income Fund (UDI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that primarily invests in US exchange-traded, dividend-paying companies that meet the funds financial and ESG criteria. UDI was launched on Jun 8, 2022 and is issued by Marygold.
